title: Who are the 8 scientists and military figures with alleged UFO ties who went missing or died? What we know
description: Eight deaths and disappearances involving scientists and military figures have raised questions with no confirmed link so far.

title: Excellent Photo Of An Alien Craft Over Norwich
description: 11-18-05 NORWICH ENGLAND My husband photographed this object late last year. I had sensed it; however, the object wasn’t visible at the time this photograph was taken. What is interesting is that the landmark is less than 40 feet high, and the [...]

title: NASA Deaths: Is There A Conspiracy Targeting Scientists With UFO Secrets?
description: A string of deaths and disappearances among NASA and US defence scientists, including asteroid expert Michael David Hicks, is raising uncomfortable questions in Washington about espionage, UFO secrets and the protection of critical technology. Officials have not confirmed any foul play, but former FBI assistant director Chris Swecker calls the cases 'suspicious' and warns hostile states are actively targeting such experts.

title: Nearly a century of wondering: The American UFO saga, in reality and in fiction
As Trump orders UFO data released, a question hangs: If aliens exist, what would they think of us?
